title: Disney's Zootopia 2 and Elio Nominated for 2026 Golden Globes
text: Disney's Zootopia 2 and Elio have been announced as contenders for the Best Motion Picture — Animated category at the 2026 Golden Globes. The six nominees for Best Animated Feature are Arco, Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Infinity Castle, Elio, KPop Demon Hunters, Little Amélie or the Character of Rain, and Zootopia 2. Both Zootopia 2 and Elio received multiple Golden Globe nominations. KPop Demon Hunters was also nominated for Best Original Song (Golden) and Cinematic and Box Office Achievement, with Zootopia 2 also getting into the latter category. Arco is from director Ugo Bienvenu and a producer roster including Natalie Portman. The Golden Globes ceremony took place on January 11, 2026.
